manual_entries.title: Schneider OCF Overcurrent Fault
manual_entries.summary: The soft starter reports an overcurrent fault when the motor current exceeds the configured protection threshold during start or run.

zh.title: Schneider OCF 过电流故障
zh.summary: 当电机电流在启动或运行期间超过设定保护阈值时，软启动器会报出过电流故障。

recommended_actions: 检查电机和负载是否卡滞
检查电流保护阈值与加速时间设置
检查电源电压和接线状态
Check whether the motor or driven load is jammed
Check the current protection threshold and acceleration time settings
Check supply voltage and wiring condition

chunk.cleaned_text: OCF overcurrent fault occurs when motor current exceeds the protection threshold during starting or running.
chunk.text_excerpt: OCF overcurrent fault during starting or running

evidence.evidence_text: OCF 过电流故障：启动或运行期间电机电流超过保护阈值。

manual_entries.title: Schneider ACC Acceleration Ramp Time
manual_entries.summary: Parameter ACC defines the acceleration ramp time used by the soft starter during motor startup.

zh.title: Schneider ACC 加速斜坡时间
zh.summary: 参数 ACC 定义软启动器在电机启动期间使用的加速斜坡时间。

structured_payload.description: 电机从初始电压升至额定启动状态的加速时间。
Acceleration ramp time from initial voltage to full starting state.

chunk.cleaned_text: ACC acceleration ramp time default 10 s for the soft starter startup profile.
chunk.text_excerpt: ACC acceleration ramp time default 10 s

evidence.evidence_text: ACC 加速时间，默认值 10 s，用于电机启动过程。

manual_entries.title: Schneider Inspect Terminals And Ventilation Path
manual_entries.summary: Inspect power terminals and keep the ventilation path clear to prevent overheating and nuisance trips.

zh.title: Schneider 检查端子和通风路径
zh.summary: 应检查功率端子并保持通风路径通畅，以防止过热和误跳闸。

steps: 检查功率端子是否松动或变色
清除通风路径中的灰尘和障碍物
Inspect power terminals for looseness or discoloration
Remove dust and obstructions from the ventilation path

chunk.cleaned_text: Inspect power terminals regularly and keep the ventilation path clear to avoid overheating in the soft starter.
chunk.text_excerpt: inspect power terminals and keep the ventilation path clear

evidence.evidence_text: 定期检查功率端子并保持通风路径清洁，以避免软启动器过热。
